creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
On Fri, 12 Mar 1999 10:30:05 PST, Rahul Dhesi wrote:

> Hi, I am in a position to track STABLE, and will do so soon.

It's a pity you won't have your STABLE machines doing the sort of work
that triggers the problem you reported.

If you _do_ encounter the same problem on a STABLE box, please submit a
PR and mail me the PR number you're assigned.

Thanks,
Sheldon.
